hooks.command: jq -c '(.tool_input.file_path // "" | ascii_downcase | split(".") | last) as $ext | if (["glb","gltf","bin","fbx","obj","stl","ply","3ds","dae","blend","ktx2","basis","drc","usdz"] | index($ext)) then {hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"Blocked: this is a binary/3D model asset. Reading it wastes tokens and returns no useful text — use ls, file size, or the path/filename instead of Read."}} else empty end'
